Note and writing apps

Justwrite is a distraction-free notes app for fast, private writing. No login, no cloud dependency, autosave, offline support, focus mode, markdown shortcuts, exports, and ambient writing modes.

results.title: Justwrite: A private, local-first writing space that works offline
results.content:
Roopesh Donde

Loved the aesthetics. I like how instantly it makes me focussed and think on what to write.   
Very minimalist and no distractions.   
One thing I would suggest to make tying sound off on default. Its Novel to hear the sounds at first, but it quickly becomes a distraction and doubles up with the actual keyboard sounds.

Tina Chhabra

there's something nice about a writing tool that just opens and works. no login, no sync setup, no onboarding flow. the ambient writing modes are a cool touch too. would be great to see some kind of simple export to markdown file so you can move notes into other tools when you need to.

Patrick Krekelberg [...] Justwrite

What do you think? … [...] Patrick Krekelberg

Local-first writing is still underrated for unfinished thinking. Draft notes, specs, prompts, and private business planning often need to exist before they are polished enough for a cloud workspace; offline ownership changes the way people are willing to write honestly.

Etienne Garcia

results.title: Online NotesPad: Free online notes taking app | Product Hunt
results.content:
Kailash G
Online NotesPad

Online NotesPad

🚀 Welcome to OnlineNotesPad.com

We're super excited to finally share this with the Product Hunt community! 🎉

OnlineNotesPad is your personal space to capture thoughts, organize ideas, and stay productive — all in one beautifully simple interface.

No sign-up is needed. No distractions. Just effortless online note-taking right in your browser – anytime, anywhere. 📝✨

✔ Save notes locally  
✔ Import/export as .txt or .json  
✔ Works offline once loaded  
✔ Dark mode included (for all you night owls 🌙)

We're building this to stay clean, fast, and truly yours — with optional upgrades like sync and mobile apps coming soon.

Check it out and let us know what you think!

💬 We’d love to hear your feedback, ideas, or even just a hello!

🌐 [...] Kailash G
Online NotesPad

Online NotesPad

@shenjun Thank you, Jun! 😄  
As a fellow dev, I’m glad you appreciate the local storage approach — giving users full control without relying on the cloud is something we really wanted to prioritize. Your support means a lot! 🙌

results.title: Simply Write: Distraction-free writing tool | Product Hunt
results.content:
Shreyans Bhansali
MakersClaw

MakersClaw

Love the focus. Quick thought—any plans to support offline drafts or cloud backup options? Even minimalist tools need a safety net sometimes.

Mukund
Simply Write

Simply Write

@shreyans\_assistiv For offline drafts, I am planning to introduce a simple desktop app, right now it saves in browser's local storage. Also thinking to add Google Drive feature to save it directly there.

Manoj Surya
Truepush

Truepush

Mukund
Simply Write

Simply Write

@manojsurya3110 Thank you so much Manoj. [...] @siddharthpereira hey Sid. yes you're right. there are hyper interactive ai powered tools out there, that you or anyone can use and those would be much better if the sole goal is to write fast. but simply write's goal is not that. there are writers who wants to write and just write for the love of writing, and to practice. if you're using an AI tool then this aspect is missed. so it's more like a journal, a notebook, a notepad, or to throw your thoughts at night when you're not feeling it. you don't want distractions then. all you need is to just empty your mind and write whatever comes without a grammar app telling you that you missed a preposition, or an ai telling you this could've been written better. it's just you, your mind, and your thoughts. that's my goal. plus it's free. [...] Simply Write
